# Product rating verified

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:1621aaa68dee74f0328f84e873f5e7b7789a0887d0ea3065b37b16d2fd7e96c5
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Verify if a user has previously bought a product by looking for the invoice payment. Useful if you want to display a "purchase verified" badge on product ratings

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

With this module you can display the **purchase_verified** boolean in the rating moderation view so you can easily identify if a user had previously bought the product before posting a rating
: ```{image} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sale_product_rating_verified/static/description/rating_moderation_verified.png
  :alt: Display the purchased_verified boolean
  ```

## Bug Tracker

In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
